headline: Autodesk Enhances AI Capabilities: Can It Unlock More Revenues?
summary: ADSK expands agentic AI, automation tools and cloud workflows to boost recurring revenues and platform stickiness.

raw.headline: Autodesk Enhances AI Capabilities: Can It Unlock More Revenues?

headline: U.S. Army Windchill Adoption And Upgraded Outlook Could Be A Game Changer For PTC (PTC)
summary: Earlier in May 2026, PTC Inc. reported strong second-quarter results with higher revenue and net income, raised its full-year 2026 guidance, expanded its share repurchase plans by up to US$2.00 billion through 2028, and saw the U.S. Army adopt its Windchill platform as the official system for enterprise product data management and lifecycle management. The U.S. Army’s designation of Windchill as its primary product data and lifecycle management platform underscores PTC’s growing role in...
